title: Planewave at an interface 0 degrees TIR
description: Reflection and transmission of a plane wave from an interface of materials with refractive indices of n1=1.5 and n2=1.0. Notice how wavelength of the wave changes when the wave is pasing from high index to low index side.
author: TapioKNiemi
attribution_md:
Planewave at an interface 0 degrees TIR
Reflection and transmission of a plane wave from an interface of materials with refractive indices of n1=1.5 and n2=1.0. Notice how wavelength of the wave changes when the wave is pasing from high index to low index side.

Image: TapioKNiemi ([source](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Planewave_at_an_interface_0_degrees_TIR.gif))
